Package com.iwedia.dtv.pvr

Class MediaInfo

java.lang.Object
com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.MediaInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
android.os.Parcelable
public final class MediaInfo extends Object implements android.os.Parcelable
Class that holds information about PVR record.

  • Nested Class Summary
